# Security

Anthale takes security seriously.

If you believe you have found a vulnerability in `anthale-openapi`, please email [security@anthale.com](mailto:security@anthale.com). Do not open a public issue or pull request for security reports.

Include:

- affected endpoint, schema, file path, or repository area
- impact and reproduction steps
- proof of concept or logs, if available

We will review the report, coordinate remediation, and follow up with disclosure guidance when appropriate.
